title: Fix foreach issue for mixed-array structures

features.name: foreach over queue of queues
features.description: Code should include a foreach loop iterating over a queue of queues (queue[$][$])

features.name: foreach over dynamic array of dynamic arrays
features.description: Code should include a foreach loop iterating over a nested dynamic array (dyn[][])

features.name: foreach over queue of dynamic arrays
features.description: Code should include a foreach loop iterating over a queue of dynamic arrays (queue[$][]) and vice versa

features.name: foreach over queue of unpacked arrays
features.description: Code should include a foreach loop iterating over a queue of unpacked arrays (queue[$][n])

features.name: mixed-array declarations with queues and dynamic arrays
features.description: Code should include mixed array declarations combining queues, dynamic arrays, and unpacked dimensions
